parameters.command: =mkdir -p {{ $json.folder }} && echo "{{ $json.base64Task }}" | base64 -d > {{ $json.folder }}/TASK.md && tmux kill-session -t {{ $json.project }} 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/claude-rc-{{ $json.project }}.txt; pkill -f "remote-control" 2>/dev/null; tmux new-session -d -s {{ $json.project }} -n claude -c {{ $json.folder }} && tmux new-window -t {{ $json.project }} -n shell -c {{ $json.folder }} && tmux new-window -t {{ $json.project }} -n git -c {{ $json.folder }} && tmux send-keys -t {{ $json.project }}:claude 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions > /tmp/claude-rc-{{ $json.project }}.txt 2>&1' Enter && echo 'started'

=for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  url=$(grep -o 'https://claude\.ai/code[^ ]*' /tmp/claude-rc-{{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.project }}.txt 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
  [ -n "$url" ] && echo "$url" && break
  sleep 5
done

parameters.responseBody:
=

Geen plan gevonden

{{ $json.errorType === 'file_not_found' ? 'Project note niet gevonden.' : 'Geen ## Plan sectie in de note. Klik eerst ▶️ Analyseer taken.' }}
